lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਦੀਨਾ ਕੀ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਵੇਦੀਨਾ ਕਾ ਖਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: vedeenaa kee dosatee vedeenaa kaa khaan |
lines.english: Make friendships with the unrighteous, and eat with the unrighteous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੋਰਾ ਜਾਰਾ ਰੰਡੀਆ ਕੁਟਣੀਆ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: choraa jaaraa randdeea kuttaneea deebaan |
lines.english: Thieves, adulterers, prostitutes and pimps,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਦਹੁ ਚੰਦਨਿ ਖਉਲੀਐ ਭੀ ਸਾਹੂ ਸਿਉ ਪਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: gadahu chandan khauleeai bhee saahoo siau paan |
lines.english: If a donkey is anointed with sandalwood paste, he still loves to roll in the dirt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਫਤੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਸਦਾ ਵਸੈ ਸੈਤਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sifatee saar na jaananee sadaa vasai saitaan |
lines.english: They do not know the value of the Lord's Praises, and Satan is always with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਾ ਕਪੜੁ ਕਛੀਐ ਕੂੜਾ ਪੈਨਣੁ ਮਾਣੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: koorraa kaparr kachheeai koorraa painan maan |1|
lines.english: False is the cloth and its measurement, and false is pride in such a garment. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੂੜੈ ਕਤਿਐ ਕੂੜਾ ਤਣੀਐ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak koorrai katiai koorraa taneeai taan |
lines.english: O Nanak, by spinning falsehood, a fabric of falsehood is woven.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਂਗਾ ਬੁਰਗੂ ਸਿੰਙੀਆ ਨਾਲੇ ਮਿਲੀ ਕਲਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: baangaa buragoo singeea naale milee kalaan |
lines.english: The callers to prayer, the flute-players, the horn-blowers, and also the singers

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਦਾਤੇ ਇਕਿ ਮੰਗਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik daate ik mangate naam teraa paravaan |
lines.english: - some are givers, and some are beggars; they become acceptable only through Your Name, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਹੈ ਕੂੜੋ ਹੋਇ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu sabh koorr hai koorro hoe geaa |
lines.english: Attachment to Maya is totally false, and false are those who go that way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਕੈ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਹਉ ਤਿਨਾ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jinaee sun kai maniaa hau tinaa vittahu kurabaan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those who hear and accept the Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਝਗੜਾ ਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਝਗੜੈ ਜਗੁ ਮੁਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai jhagarraa paaeon jhagarrai jag mueaa |
lines.english: Through egotism, the world is caught in conflict and strife, and it dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਝਗੜੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਓਨੁ ਇਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jhagarr chukaaeon iko rav rahiaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is free of conflict and strife, and sees the One Lord, pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aatam raam pachhaaniaa bhaujal tar geaa |
lines.english: Recognizing that the Supreme Soul is everywhere, he crosses over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jot samaanee jot vich har naam sameaa |14|
lines.english: His light merges into the Light, and he is absorbed into the Lord's Name. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਗਰਬੁ ਨਿਵਾਰੀਐ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: haumai garab nivaareeai kaam krodh ahankaar |
lines.english: May I subdue and quiet my egotism, pride, sexual desire, anger and self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੀਖਿਆ ਦੇਹਿ ਮੈ ਤੂੰ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਥੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bheekhiaa dehi mai toon samrath daataar |
lines.english: O True Guru, bless me with Your charity; You are the All-powerful Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਵਤਨ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਮੈਲਾ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis navatan niramalaa mailaa kabahoon na hoe |
lines.english: Day and night, keep me ever-fresh and new, spotless and pure; let me never be soiled by sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਪਰਜਾਲੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: lab lobh parajaaleeai naam milai aadhaar |
lines.english: Burn away all my greed, and give me the Support of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੋ ਕੰਤੁ ਸਬਾਈਆ ਜਿਤੀ ਦਰਿ ਖੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: eiko kant sabaaeea jitee dar kharreeaah |
lines.english: There is only the one Husband Lord, for all who stand at His Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਨਦਰਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ih bidh chhutteeai nadar teree sukh hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, in this way I am saved; by Your Grace, I have found peace. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਕੰਤੈ ਰਤੀਆ ਮੈ ਦੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਕਿਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe kantai rateea mai dohaagan kit |
lines.english: All are imbued with love for their Husband Lord; I am a discarded bride - what good am I?

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੰਤੈ ਰਤੀਆ ਪੁਛਹਿ ਬਾਤੜੀਆਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kantai rateea puchheh baatarreeaah |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they ask for news of their Husband Lord, from those who are imbued with His Love. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਤਨਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਏਤੜੇ ਖਸਮੁ ਨ ਫੇਰੇ ਚਿਤੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mai tan avagan etarre khasam na fere chit |3|
lines.english: My body is filled with so many faults; my Lord and Master does not even turn His thoughts to me. ||3||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਦੈ ਵਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree tin kau sifat jinaa dai vaat |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who praise the Lord with their mouths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਇਕ ਮੈ ਦੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਰਾਤਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabh raatee sohaaganee ik mai dohaagan raat |4|
lines.english: All the nights are for the happy soul-brides; I am a discarded bride - if only I could have even one night with Him! ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਮੰਗਤੁ ਜਾਚੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਦੀਜੈ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dar mangat jaachai daan har deejai kripaa kar |
lines.english: I am a beggar at Your Door, begging for charity; O Lord, please grant me Your Mercy, and give to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਜਾਇ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਧਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: anahad sabad vajaae jotee jot dhar |
lines.english: Then, the unstruck melody of the Shabad will vibrate and resound, and my light will blend with the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਜਨੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh lehu milaae jan paavai naam har |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, unite me, your humble servant, with You, that I may receive Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕਰਿ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: jag meh varatai aap har setee preet kar |15|
lines.english: The Lord Himself is pervading and permeating the world; so fall in love with Him! ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਜੈ ਜੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai har gun gaae jai jai sabad har |
lines.english: Within my heart, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and celebrate the Word of the Lord's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸੁ ਕੰਤ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinee na paaeo prem ras kant na paaeo saau |
lines.english: Those who do not obtain the sublime essence, the love and delight of their Husband Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਞੇ ਘਰ ਕਾ ਪਾਹੁਣਾ ਜਿਉ ਆਇਆ ਤਿਉ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sunye ghar kaa paahunaa jiau aaeaa tiau jaau |1|
lines.english: are like guests in a deserted house; they leave just as they have come, empty-handed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹਣੁ ਛਡਿ ਕੈ ਕਰੰਗੀ ਲਗਾ ਹੰਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sifat salaahan chhadd kai karangee lagaa hans |
lines.english: the swan-soul has renounced the Lord's Praises, and attached itself to a rotting carcass.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਉ ਓਲਾਮੑੇ ਦਿਨੈ ਕੇ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਿਲਨੑਿ ਸਹੰਸ ॥
lines.translit: sau olaamae dinai ke raatee milana sahans |
lines.english: He receives hundreds and thousands of reprimands, day and night;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਭੋ ਦੁਸਮਨੁ ਹੇਤੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam vin sabho dusaman het |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, all one's friends turn to enemies. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਟੁ ਇਵੇਹਾ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਜਿਤੁ ਖਾਇ ਵਧਾਇਆ ਪੇਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: fitt ivehaa jeeviaa jit khaae vadhaaeaa pett |
lines.english: Cursed is that life, in which one only eats to fill his belly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਿਤ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee gun gaavai nit janam savaariaa |
lines.english: The minstrel continually sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, to embellish his life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਸਚਾ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sev salaeh sachaa ur dhaariaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh serves and praises the True Lord, enshrining Him within his heart.
